required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes regular in-person meetups with his brother each week—video calls are reserved only for unavoidable absences

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly video calls with his brother at the same time—never cancels without warning

required_preferences.fact: Schedules home-based family activities on Saturdays—parks are now less feasible due to increased after-school responsibilities and his wife’s workload

supersedes.fact: Plans family outings at local parks every Saturday—never schedules work events on these afternoons

required_preferences.fact: Schedules daily reminders for his mother-in-law’s physical therapy exercises and tracks progress in a shared family app to ensure adherence and recovery milestones are met
Seeks out peer-to-peer mentoring calls with colleagues managing similar new accounts after a territory change, rather than relying solely on self-study
Communicates with his wife about work conflicts daily—never leaves her out of travel planning
Uses campus shuttle and public transit for evening MBA classes—avoids driving to reduce stress after long workdays

persona: A mid-level sales manager at a multinational pharmaceutical company
